item.title: Talktiv v0.4.0
item.description:
What's New in v0.4.0

  • Meeting Mode — Record Zoom, Google Meet, Teams calls with live transcription and speaker identification
  • Voice Notepad — Dictate freely, edit inline, copy when done
  • Auto-detect meetings — Detects when meeting windows open, auto-starts recording
  • Speaker diarization — Identifies different speakers using audio analysis
  • Markdown export — Meetings saved as .md with YAML frontmatter
  • Meeting intelligence — Claude API for action items, decisions, summaries
  • Multi-strategy paste — CGEvent, AppleScript, and AXUIElement fallback chain
  • Smart media control — Checks actual playback state before pausing
  • File-based logging — Diagnostics at ~/Library/Application Support/Talktiv/talktiv.log
  • Auto-updates via Sparkle
